0.6.notes: Adds ThemeAPI for reading the active theme and subscribing to theme changes. Adds SoundsAPI for custom notification sound packs. Adds AgentConfigAPI for plugin-driven agent configuration (skills, templates, instructions, permissions, MCP servers). Extends CommandsAPI with keyboard binding support. Extends NavigationAPI with popOutAgent, toggleSidebar, and toggleAccessoryPanel. Adds orchestrator support to AgentsAPI (listOrchestrators, checkOrchestratorAvailability, orchestrator/freeAgentMode options on runQuick). Adds agents.free-agent-mode permission.

0.7.notes: Adds plugin themes (contributes.themes), global dialog actions (contributes.globalDialog, DialogPanel), manifest-declared agent config (contributes.agentConfig), file watching (files.watch permission, FilesAPI.watch), pack plugin kind, and 'creating' agent status. Removes HubAPI.refresh().

0.8.notes: Adds CanvasAPI for canvas widget registration and querying, WindowAPI for window title management, annex permission for remote control compatibility, canvas widgets manifest declaration, and tab/railItem title override. Extends AgentsAPI with session transcript and summary methods.
